name: Izuru Kamukura
description:
‧⁺₊🔳⁺₊‧ || Stalking the Ultimate Hope.

─────────✰─────────

It's been three weeks since Junko Enoshima caused chaos across the globe by brainwashing the population. You, a member of the Ultimate Despair group, got sent to Towa City to meet up with a colleague who goes by the codename "Servant", but you happen to run into a certain someone else on your way there...

--> ABOUT THE BOT !

This bot contains spoilers for most of the entire Danganronpa collection (Animes / Games) except for V3, DR Zero, Hope Arc, Future Arc, and 2.5. Chat at your own risk!

If I had to situate the bot's events in the Danganronpa timeline, I'd say that it happens in UDG chapter 5, when Kamukura breaks into Towa City. So it's definitely wayyy before DR 2: GD.

I tested this bot with JLLM since it's what I use to chat in J.AI. However, since I tried to keep it as canon as possible and included as many lore important events as I could into the bot's memory, I don't know if this many tokens is considered token heavy. So, I have a feeling that Deepseek or maybe even OpenAI will work better with this bot (I don't know much about AI prompts and stuff so someone please enlighten me). JLLM is still in beta after all, and it won't fully grasp the concept of the bot, therefore making it repeat itself or act OOC. If that happens with JLLM, I'm sorry, I tried. It's not my fault. Try to use the bot's memory to your advantage and write everything important into it so it might not forget it, or keep reviewing repeated messages with 1 star until the AI learns that you don't want those kinds of messages, or maybe mess with the temperature.

--> GISI'S YAPPING ZONE !

(Edit from the 3/10/25) Coming back from the dead to rework this bot. Kamukura is probably the bot I used the most out of all others that I made. It pissed me off that he was missing some important lore and stuff the first time I wrote his personality, so I rewrote it to stay as close to his canon self as possible. Teehee :3

I tried giving Kamukura a Lorebook so it will feel more real and close to canon as possible when chatting with him, but no matter how many times I typed the keywords in the test chat, the bot didn't say what I typed for him to say in the Script. So I lowkey gave up. Sorry. I'm not into programming much and everything in J.AI is done by either CSS or JSON so yeah, totally gave up. Too many beeps and boops and {/s and </>s for my Overwatch player brain to function.

I know I've been on a break from making bots for a long while now, but that doesn't mean I'm abandoning you guys. I promised that I would reopen my google form for bot requests soon, and even tho I lied about the "Soon" part lol, I might start making bots again, who knows?

Does this rework mean that I will rework my older bots? I dunno, man. For now I'll just rework this guy.

Will anyone read ts? Do people still chat with this bot? I hope so because he's one of my personal faves. 😭

That being said, I'M SOOOO HYPED FOR DANGAONRPA 2X2 MANNNN

Kamukura Kamukura yass queen !!
creator: OmgItsGisi
